Iron Scroll of War  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Charges: 2
AC: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +10 INT: +10 MANA: +50
Effect: Supernova (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: CLR DRU SHM NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Iron Scroll of War
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Charges: 2
AC: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +10 INT: +10 MANA: +50
Effect: Supernova (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: CLR DRU SHM NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Scroll of Destruction
Item Type:Shield
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 01:45:02
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 58
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
The Statue of Rallos Zek

Kael Drakkel

Best Class for this
QuoteReply
# May 07 2003 at 5:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782049866
143 posts
As a wizzy I would love to have this item, but I don't think that I am the best choice for this. Honestly, I would like to see this on a beastlord or enchanter before any other classes. The 35 ac is awesome for both classes, and the wis / int and mana just make it cake. As a wizzy, I find ac to be wasted on me, when it could have gone to a tanking hybrid who doesn't use bows, or to a enchanter who is always getting beatdowns. And the talisman of benovelance(sp) is a great range item for the pure wis casters. I would still love to have this awesome range slot item on my wizzy **** though.

Edited, Wed May 7 18:07:16 2003

▲ Page top
RE: no longer expendable
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2002 at 4:05 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591771609439
5 posts
Got this item yesterday, if I'm not wrong it still shows the 2 charges on it~

EDIT: nm, misinterpreted the EXPENDABLE thing... :)

Edited, Tue Mar 26 11:08:00 2002
▲ Page top
RE: no longer expendable
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2003 at 5:14 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
There's a difference between "not expendable" and "unlimited charges". If something is expendable then is vanishes when you use all the charges, but if it's not expendable then it is still there, just with 0 charges remaining.

A stein of Moggok has 5 changes of light healing, for example, but is still valuable when those are gone (not expendable). A potion ceases to be when all its charges are gone (expendable).

So it may no longer be expendable, but still only have 2 charges. I think if you sell it to a vendor and buy it back it will be recharged, but they usually make the difference between the sell price and the buy price insanely high. It used to be the Staff of Forbidden Rites (10 charges of Ressurection, any preist class) could be bought back for only a few hundered platinum more than it was sold for, but of course they nerfed it.
▲ Page top
RE: no longer expendable
QuoteReply
# Dec 05 2003 at 5:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1704672973637
Guru
5,311 posts
Just a small correction. The Stein of Moggok has 3 charges of light healing, not 5.

I had an enchanter toon who repeatedly ran the Stein of Moggok quest for supplemental income.
▲ Page top
RE: no longer expendable
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2003 at 11:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758287478
4 posts
This is not entirely true. In order to "recharge" something at an NPC vendor you need to sell the same item fully charged item back to the same vendor first...then sell the item that is empty to them. Then you can buy them both back, fully charged. In the case of lore items, you will need to have two different characters with the items. Vendors don't care about lore flags. Good luck!

Bemagi/Beorc/Bedark Vazaelle Server
▲ Page top
RE: no longer expendable
QuoteReply

94 posts

__DEL__1591755170411
9 posts
Yes, ive killed him so no bs about me being a noob plz ,)

those classes doesnt need AC so bad...

int and wis should be 200+ when ye can join a party to kill this guy...

so that leaves us with mana 50 in the rangeslot, oh well, plus 1 mana for each int/wis over 200 so lets make it mana 60.

Talisman of Benevolance would be alot better for the priests but dont get me wrong, I dont say this item is bad, im just saying its not that great (or uber as some would say).

Risk vs Reward
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2001 at 5:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764262734
27 posts
Sorry but theres no such thing as risk vs reward. People can be resed corpses can be summoned. I see no risk at all in killing the SoRZ besides a little exp loss. Its more now Difficulty vs reward and this fits the bill, much like the rest of the drops from the statue. The expendable thing sucks but you just have to be a little more carfull about where you right click.

QuoteReply

__DEL__1591757036990

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 07 2001 at 9:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ha ha ha ha ha... just think take a low lvl character in there to loot the scroll then take him to a newby plaves then click supernova on another character instant death to that character...lol....ooohhh yea i forgot some people are scared to play on a pvp server.
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 07 2001 at 9:55 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ha ha ha ha ha... just think take a low lvl character in there to loot the scroll then take him to a newby plaves then click supernova on another character instant death to that character...lol....ooohhh yea i forgot some people are scared to play on a pvp server
Further thought
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 8:33 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
Overnight, I thought about this item more. It's an "OK" item that fell short of being a "Great!" item by one thing. The fact that it's expendable. (Having 2 charges is rather lame as well.)

IMO, this is another item where the risk does NOT equal the reward. Ever accidentally use a charge on an item while trying to look at it? Would be a sad moment to lose this to a buggy mouse or lag.

Anyway, (I'm praying that the item developing guys at VI read this) treat items like this just like the donal armor. Don't give them charges, instead make the casting time sufficiently long that the item won't be abused. I think that would go a long way towards balancing risk and reward.
▲ Page top
RE: Further thought
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2002 at 10:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782777086
76 posts
Hummm, 35ac range caster item that any guild that can do Vindi can take out? sure the effect may suck, but WHAT THE HELL?!? look at 35ac, think about those nice squishy casters like wizards and/or chanter who sometimes take beatings during normal fights, now, go back about when guilds were actually doing this, before Vex Thal or the new planes, this was one of the best range items ever to obtain, and it still is for most casters 55+
▲ Page top
RE: Further thought
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2001 at 8:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1685924205458
39 posts
It's a Range Item with 35 AC and 10 int/wis. Who gives a dang about the effect. This is a great item, as I said, dont bother even touching the effect...you have two charges..1 just in case you click on it by accident.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 31 2001 at 9:18 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ***** the charges! Heck, make it only one charge and expendable! THink closely now ... it has AC, it has WIS, it has INT, it has MANA, it has RANGE SLOT!!!
RE: Further thought
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 10:53 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
*Sigh*

You responded in a rather excited state, so likely didn't process what I said. Please read it again, think about it. Or as you said "think closely now." I'm not sure how one "thinks closely," but I'm sure you understood what you meant.

In my opinion, the scroll is one sliver shy of "greatness." After putting it to thought, I gave my opinion what would give it that "Leap." Note: I thought about what I said. Did you even "think" before posting your flame and calling me an idiot?

EQplayers have grown used to sandboxes like EQvault and Whineplay forums and forget that forums were once a place where people shared ideas and opinions. Rather than insults.

Good day.

QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2001 at 2:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246460789
View User Forum
513 posts
Wow! That's just neat!

What does Supernova do, anyway?

Not like it matters that there's only 2 charges, as a Range Slot item, it rules!

P.S. What does it look like when equipped, Vinnie?
▲ Page top
RE: Awesome!
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2002 at 9:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245905595
343 posts
The effect is a point blank area of effect with an unlimited amount of targets. The effect is centered on the caster, so when you use the charge, be in the center of your 12 mobs, and let loose with 875 damage, that is usually not resisted (at least I've never had a resist on it).

Lvl 49 wizard spell... costs BOOKOO mana to cast, like 695 or something insane...
▲ Page top
RE: Awesome!
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2001 at 2:57 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592249606794
75 posts
Supernova

Decrease Hit Points (HP) by 854 (L49)
Classes: Wiz (L49)
Skill: Evocation
Allowable Targets: Point Blank AoE

Area Effect Range: 35 feet

......its expendable so I would only use it once. If at all
